props.name: as
props.description: Component used for the root node. Either a string to use a HTML element or a component.

props.name: compact
props.description: Make nav group more compact by cutting all `padding` in half.

props.name: visible
props.description:
Show nav group items. Acts as the initial state on its own, or as the controlled value
when paired with a `v-model:visible` / `@update:visible` listener.
